description_long: This is a vintage, metal fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red body and a large, conical black nozzle attached to a brass valve assembly at the top. The extinguisher features a prominent, aged label with faded graphics and text, mostly in yellow and red, partially peeling and worn from use. A sturdy red handle is affixed to the neck, designed for carrying or operation, and the nozzle is connected via a short, rigid brass pipe. The top of the extinguisher has a round, flat valve control, likely for releasing the extinguishing agent. The surface shows signs of wear, including scratches, paint chips, and some rust, indicating long-term use or storage. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible mechanical parts and a robust, industrial appearance.
description: A vintage red metal fire extinguisher with a large black nozzle, brass fittings, and a worn yellow label. It features a sturdy handle and visible signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow label, red handle, brass valve, and the full length of the black nozzle.
description_view_1: Rear view with the label partially visible, handle prominent, and nozzle mostly out of sight.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the cylindrical red body, brass valve, and the full profile of the black nozzle.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the nozzle's opening and the top valve, with the label partially visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large, rectangular, yellowed label with faded graphics and text is present on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A red metal handle is attached to the neck for carrying; no separate mounting bracket or holder is visible.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A large, conical black nozzle is attached to the brass valve assembly at the top, connected by a short rigid pipe.
